feed.title: SAP Community - SAP AI Services
feed.subtitle: SAP AI Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BER AI Model Training Job Issue
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We have been trying to train custom AI model for Business Entity Recognition from past couple of weeks. But, we need to know how we can structure training document as there are issues with let's say double quotes or data issue in so & so line?
There is no mention of whether double quotes within text can be used or not?

Have followed the blog : https://help.sap.com/viewer/b43f8f61368d455793a241d2b10baeb2/SHIP/en-US/a1df156894ed4df7810d0a5abcce8d92.html
Attaching sample document.ber-ai-model.txt

entry.title: Documentation for Scene Text Recognition API
entry.content:
I found many mentions of Scene Text Recognition API in blogs and articles but I'm unable to find an official documentation for this service.

How can I use this service?

Some mentions of this service:

https://jam4.sapjam.com/wiki/show/r6wY0apo9c9URd44Wx1Xks

https://answers.sap.com/questions/673750/how-to-consume-ml-services-from-sapui5.html

entry.title: Comparing SAP IRPA and SAP Invoice Management (Vendor Invoice Mgmt)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Need some guidance on comparison of SAP IRPA & SAP Invoice Management (VIM) by OpenText.

Ex. for use case of automating of extracting data from vendor invoice pdf attachments from mailbox and uploading to SAP screens (ex MIRO), is combination of "SAP IRPA + SAP AI Business services like Document Information Extraction" sufficient or "SAP Invoice Management" alone to be considered. What could be the pros/cons of each approach

Thanks & Regards,

Vishal Rathi

entry.title: Error during the deployment creation of SAP AI core
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am facing an error during template deployment.

I was able to successfully train the mode in SAP AI core. But during deployment, I am facing the below issue:

error in status

Can you anyone help me in this area?

Thanks

Regards

Lavanya K

entry.title: Can Document Information Extraction be used to post supplier invoice in SAP ERP ECC 6.0?
entry.content:
Hello,

My understanding is that it is possible with SAP Build Process Automation to create an automated process using Document Information Extraction service to extract data and then post supplier invoices in an S/4HANA on-premise system. This would be done with api_supplierinvoice_process_srv_0001, if that is correct.

However, in my scenario it is an SAP ERP ECC 6.0 on-premise system that is conntected to SAP BTP, using cloud connector. Is it possible to use Document Information Extraction service in a similar way as described above to automatically post supplier invoices and how would this be achieved?

Thank you.

entry.title: Data Attribute Recommendation - Unable to create or delete job with SAP AI APIs with Postman
entry.content:
Hi juliana.morais et al,

I hope you are well. I have been exploring use cases for SAP BTP and completing few missions with SAP BTP Trial account. I reckon the Data Attribute Recommendations might be helpful for the Data Integrity team here to create and maintain the articles master data. Hence, I have been following the tutorials, e.g., Use Data Attribute Recommendation With Your Own Dataset | SAP Tutorials, which are excellent!

I was able to create my own schema, dataset, and upload my csv file successfully. However, I am now stuck. I cannot create nor delete the job.

I could not find any notes, and most of blogs are not technical at all to troubleshoot Data Attribute Recommendation. Apologies if I missed anything. I hope I can get any help.

Thanks,

Jacques

entry.title: Processing custom documents through SAP-DIE Tool
entry.content:
Hi,

1. Is there a way I can process the Settlement Statement, Imbalance summary report & Monthly activity reports documents through SAP-DIE Tool other than the default document types already available in the tool which are (Invoice, Payment Advice & Purchase Order)?

2. How, where/when can the custom document type can be selected? (Purpose of the Custom document type).

entry.title: Document information extraction
entry.content: Hi, I would like to know if there is historical data saved somewhere in DOX. Or is DOX model trained based on historical data?

entry.title: DOX further procedure
entry.content:
Hi, what happens after the information is extracted from a document (eg. invoice)? What happens after downloading the extraction in either csv, json or txt? Can you please explain the next step?

Thank you,

Medha

entry.title: Can I train my own Document Information Extraction model?
entry.content:
I am currently trying to figure out a way to train my own Document Information Extraction model. I work with pharmaceutical batch records and need to extract the information. Creating a template for them in the standard Document Information Extraction app wouldn't work because they are all quite diverse. Can someone recommend to me the best approach to take?

Within SAP, where can I develop this application that will allow it to access foundational models? Can I train, test, and verify the model within said development environment? Is there a way to leverage generative AI to aid me?

In a OpenSAP course I did, the lecturers mentioned that we'd be able to further train existing Foundational Models to suite our use cases. Is that available yet, and if so, where is it situated?

How do I access the Generative AI hub? Does it form part of the AI Launchpad?

I am new to the SAP space and find it challenging to navigate all the different products and services.

entry.title: The procurement process
entry.content: The procurement process is critical to lowering the company's procurement costs and its profitability. Companies invest resources and efforts in technological tools in the field of BI/AI that make it possible to improve procurement performance. Name one system in the field of BI/AI that makes it possible to improve procurement performance. Briefly describe how the system / module / functionality enables this control. Specify 4 critical indicators (KPI) that make it possible to measure procurement performance and explain their importance in the process.

entry.title: Accessing a service deployed in sap ai launchpad via postman/CODE
entry.content:
hi,

we have created and deployed a service through ai launchpad, and have a service url.however i need to hit this api and get the response in my code. when i hit the url through postman i get 404 error.

can someone please guide me in this?

my query is: i want to access the api deployed via sap launchpad in my code and display results as part of app.

entry.title: How should SAP embrace SAP AI?
entry.content:
I would like to express my sincere gratitude for considering my inquiry.

SAP has made significant investments in the field of artificial intelligence, and I have been fascinated by   AI  JOULE. I am impressed with the concept of end users being able to operate and configure the SAP system through natural language. Moreover, SAP Business AI appears to provide users with valuable implementation recommendations, based on the analysis of business data. This integration of AI into the SAP system enables users to interact with it in a more intuitive and efficient manner, thereby enhancing the overall user experience.

However, as I embark on my journey as a new SAP consultant,  I am curious to know to

1) What extent AI will challenge the role of SAP consultants in the future?  How far is the future?

2) Given this rapid technological shift, I am also wondering what steps a new SAP consultant should take to embrace this change and stay ahead of the curve. What knowledge or skills should we acquire to face the challenges posed by artificial intelligence?

3) In this era of SAP AI,  what is the most effective and efficient way to learn SAP?

Your guidance and expertise in this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you once again for considering my questions, and I look forward to your responses.

entry.title: What is the use of SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad
entry.content:
SAP is always providing innovation solutions to be competitor with industry standards, as part of this SAP Introduced SAP AI Core and AI launchpad services in BTP.

What is the significance of SAP AI Core and AI Launchpad. How can I use these services in integrating with SAP Commerce.

Thank you

entry.title: What is generative AI? How is it useful in SAP? What are its application with respect to SAP PM?
entry.content:
What is generative AI? How is it useful in SAP? What are its application with respect to SAP PM?

 

Can someone elaborate it's uses?

entry.title: SAP GENAI Deployment URL is not able to connect in POSTMAN
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

SAP GENAI deployment URL is not able to respond the query back. I followed the same tutorial:Prompt LLMs in the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core & Launchpad | SAP Tutorials

any suggestion please?

Thanks,

Padmindra

#genai #LLM #SAPGENAI

entry.title: Mitigating gender bias with Job description Generator?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
we were originally interested in the Job Analyzer because it reduces gender bias. However, as it is not available in German, we have considered activating the other tool, which covers significantly more interesting functions. Do you know whether it also mitigates gender bias in its language?

Thank you!

Vicki

entry.title: Object store secret mys-object-store-secret not found
entry.content: while running the execution, getting the below error:

entry.title: SAP AI Launchpad: Dead process after 2 hours
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a basic execution, it ended up in Dead state with below status:

{
"details": [
{
"container_name": "main",
"exit_code": "",
"last_log_messages": "Error pulling container main logs",
"message": "Back-off pulling image ***/house-price:02\"",
"pod_name": "efdb960a3aff0aad-mycodeblock1-3924317824",
"ready": false
},
{
"container_name": "wait",
"exit_code": "",
"last_log_messages": "...-05-02T12:10:***\" level=info msg=\"Alloc=5477 TotalAlloc=13200 Sys=17383 NumGC=58 Goroutines=7\"time=\"2024-05-02T12:15:***\" level=info msg=\"Alloc=5457 TotalAlloc=13303 Sys=17383 NumGC=61 Goroutines=7\"",
"message": "",
"pod_name": "efdb960a3aff0aad-mycodeblock1-3924317824",
"ready": true
}
],
"workflow_info": [
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "efdb960a3aff0aad",
"message": "child 'efdb960a3aff0aad-3924317824' failed",
"name": "efdb960a3aff0aad",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "Steps"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "efdb960a3aff0aad-3924317824",
"message": "Step exceeded its deadline",
"name": "efdb960a3aff0aad[0].mypredictor",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "Pod"
},
{
"exit_code": "",
"id": "efdb960a3aff0aad-885417400",
"message": "child 'efdb960a3aff0aad-3924317824' failed",
"name": "efdb960a3aff0aad[0]",
"outputs": "",
"phase": "Failed",
"type": "StepGroup"
}
]
}

Regards,

Niharika.

entry.title: I am unable to create instance for Data Attribute Recommendation instance.
entry.content:
I am trying to create an instance for Data Attribute recommendation. But it is failing repeatedly. I tried with Booster as well, but still the same issue persists.

I am trying to do it for May Developer challenge. It is the first step and I stuck on the first step itself
